display.purpose: Page h1s and hero-scale numbers (exam score, streak count). Fraunces only, never below ~18px.

headline.purpose: Section titles inside cards and page sub-sections.

body.purpose: Default UI copy, descriptions, exercise statements. Inter, capped ~70ch.

label.purpose: Stat-tile labels, form labels, badge text. Inter, uppercase-capable.

shadows.name: susurro
shadows.purpose: Inputs and secondary/outline/destructive buttons — barely perceptible interactive hint.

shadows.name: base
shadows.purpose: Cards and primary buttons — the system's strongest shadow, still subtle.

motion.name: transition-colors
motion.purpose: Default state-change transition on buttons, links, nav items. No transform/scale choreography in the current system.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default call-to-action button: generate simulacro, save profile, submit exam.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: oklch(0.34 0.13 265); color: oklch(0.985 0.008 85); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.34 0.13 265 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.34 0.13 265); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary/cancel action paired next to a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: oklch(0.985 0.008 85); color: oklch(0.21 0.04 260); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.015 85); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.012 85); }

components.name: Difficulty Badge
components.description: Small status/topic/difficulty tag shown on exercise cards and exam question chips.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; background: oklch(0.34 0.13 265); color: oklch(0.985 0.008 85); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 10px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Base container for panel stat sections, exercise cards, and result summaries.
components.html:
Aciertos por tema

Resuelve ejercicios para ver tu progreso.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.015 85); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Fraunces, ui-serif, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.21 0.04 260); margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.48 0.025 260); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text/number/date field used across forms (profile, admin exam form).
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.21 0.04 260); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.015 85); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.48 0.025 260); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.34 0.13 265); }

components.name: Stat Tile
components.description: Signature dashboard component: icon chip + uppercase label + large number. Used for streak, accuracy, weekly goals, exam countdown.
components.html:
Racha (días)

12
components.css: .ds-stat-tile { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.015 85); border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-stat-icon { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(0.34 0.13 265 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.34 0.13 265); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.48 0.025 260); } .ds-stat-value { font-family: Fraunces, ui-serif, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.21 0.04 260); margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Favorite Star
components.description: Icon-only toggle marking an exercise as favorited. The one place amber fills a shape solid rather than tinting text.
components.html: <button class="ds-fav-btn" aria-label="Marcar como favorita"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="ds-fav-star"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-fav-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 6px; border: none; background: transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-fav-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.012 85); } .ds-fav-star { fill: none; stroke: oklch(0.48 0.025 260); stroke-width: 2; } .ds-fav-btn[data-active="true"] .ds-fav-star { fill: oklch(0.78 0.165 70); stroke: oklch(0.78 0.165 70); }

narrative.northStar: El Cuaderno de Estudio (The Study Notebook)
narrative.overview: MatePre is built to feel like a well-kept academia notebook, not a consumer app fighting for attention. The canvas is paper, the ink is deep and legible, and the one recurring accent — Ámbar Resaltador — behaves like a highlighter pen: precise, occasional, never a wash of color. Fraunces carries the authority of a printed textbook heading; Inter carries the clarity of a well-typeset problem set. This system explicitly rejects the energetic, badge-covered, confetti-driven register that gamified study apps default to — MatePre has streaks, weekly goals, and a leaderboard, but they read as quiet accountability tools dressed in the same rigorous notebook language as everything else.
keyCharacteristics: Paper background, deep ink text, one authoritative blue, one sparing amber highlight.
Fraunces paired against Inter — a textbook-heading-vs-problem-set contrast.
Flat, whisper-quiet elevation: borders and spacing carry hierarchy, not shadow depth.
No gamified visual flourishes despite streak/goal/ranking mechanics.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Ámbar Resaltador appears on badges, active-state accents, and single point-of-emphasis moments only — never as a fill covering more than a small fraction of any screen.

rules.name: The No-Serif-in-the-Body Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is reserved for headings and hero-scale numbers only; body/UI text below ~18px is always Inter.

rules.name: The Whisper Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows never grow to signal hover/active state; background opacity or the focus ring carries that signal instead.

dos: Do keep Azul Academia Profundo as the only color allowed real surface area.
Do use Fraunces exclusively for Display/Headline/Title roles and Inter for everything else.
Do keep shadows at Susurro/Base strength only.
Do dress streaks, weekly goals, and the leaderboard in the same notebook visual language as every other screen.
Do verify body text contrast against Notebook Paper/Blanco Tarjeta.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent hue.
Don't add gamified visual flourishes — no confetti, no cartoon badges, no bouncy motion, no mascot.
Don't use border-left/border-right accent stripes on cards or list items.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip: text for emphasis.
Don't darken or enlarge shadows on hover/active states.
